content: If you see anyone named Camrq
That’s me
i barely play anymore
i run 10 Ws and leave
I
I've played like 1300 games of traphase in 2 months (no life, unemployed)
cool
To be honest
With the rework of some wheels
Now traphase is literally shitty
This combo destroy every buffs
Without drawback
4 arith cost for full cleanse
it did that before didn't it?
That wheel got reworked
yeah but the earlier version was it dispelled on strike
which works the same with frenzied rend
tho i don't remember if it was a 3 or 2 cost before
ah yeah it used to be 3
so a slight buff to the frenzied rend cleanse but a nerf to everything else
tbh i prefer it this way, way better now that you have to choose between arithmetica 24 and cleanse 24
I mean... That basically mean
Lily can one shot everyone
lily could one shot everyone before
Lily + doll + pandia + 24
i mean we've always had the, at worst, 5 cost dispel on exalt
My bad, didn't precised
What i meant was lily couldn't properly one shot because of barrier
Now with arith reduc
You just strike with 24 then strike with lily
that's not really different from getting at least a 4 cost team dispel wheel is it?
a little more consistent maybe but
That wheel scale on max arith so it costed a lot
Meanwhile you can just push back the buff with lower arith cost
well it ranges between 3-5
whereas 24 dispel always costs 4
I wish they let us use every wheel or units
It feels forced into BP
what're u missing?
also if ur really struggling with a wheel, just use gunshot
fucks up every wheel user's plan
also if u want anti-cleave, u can use the barrier on death wheel
Which one it was?
I don't have ryker posse
Still need to daily missions to get the thing for his side story
Fair
what ends up happening is every otk team uses entangle posse and a backup wheel
doesnt change anything
also miryam is a thing
maybe if we get draft mode
if theyre bringing miryam they usually dont have self cleanse
i mean any team is gonna have another that counters it, you cant foolproof against all otks
just gotta experiment with what youre given
we just need draft mode tbh
most of the current pvp fights ends up being who happens to have a comp that full counters the other and/or rng highroll simulator
you might be burnt out
im already burnt out from rng simulator rn
each season i just do 10 W
where do you think all the previous traphase veterans went
they quit
i dont think about them at all to be honest
Fk this gamemode <:dead:1356082627509092372>
I'm getting too salty, i guess i quit for my own good
still winning \o/
same shit for the last 8 months but
if you dont like some wheels
play agrippa

aoe entangle + mono entangle
karen : random entangle on exalt sometimes
entangle is one of the best cc now
a lot of powerfull wheels
A lot of times it just feels more like a coinflip than skill expression tbh
Don't get wheels until the 4th turn of the game... Meanwhile the enemy full wheel turn 1 or 2
When you need to draw a single strike from someone to be able to exalt and win, the rng is 6 cards out of 8 in the deck and the strike card is not drawn twice
And you lose afterward because of that
Etc

That's every game after you hit the skill cap.
Game sucks and it feels like pure rng.
idk how to feel about my deck getting copied by higher elo player. I have mixed feelings.
I guess it doesn't matter, just don't want them to claim ownership of it :/
new meta stuff, ogier silver heart + treasure reality
Well... They just no brain copy paste what works to be able to rank 1st every season
he changed the posse/wheels a bit, i think made the deck worse though
Maybe he doesn't have the wheel / posse unlocked yet
But tbh
It just feels like shit
no, critical point was one of my wheels, everyone has it.
I'm experimenting now but it just seems like nothing could be stronger than original lineup
I realized I can have anybody in the back from red/purple
i didn't realize how awful ramona was though
her echo turns into illusion
Was murphy's health 100 previous patch? I don't see a mention of it in the patch notes, I don't think it was 100 before.
It was around 109 if i'm not wrong
no, less if anything
maybe 109 from long long ago
I vaguely remember checking max hp amounts for each category with the conclusion of maxhp purple 99hp
Hmmmm
umm, nvm. i found a clip of mine and her health is 100
maybe i missed her bc didn't own her yet??? odd
im done experimenting with non ogier entities. Entwine made it so i don't get his cleanse. Bottom decking also made it no cleanse.
here's a little clip from my most recent game
bottom decked mouse wisdom. not sure what to use instead of it. revive seems bad
ive been leaning towards this kinda team for a while now
most other stuff seem more rng
you just kill your own last unit, then place daff wheel over silver heart
yeah and ogier cleanse same turn
yeah
its essentially similar to cleave teams but with more steps and isnt as rng

it happened once and i gave daff wheel to celeste and she cleaned up
figures
people prefer to target celeste or ghelot
i cant tell who your frontliner is... sorel?
its ghelot
sorel 2nd
yeahthe not gelot one
figures its celeste
gotta use sorel celste
too strong abilities last man alive
it does probably lose to snipe teams that snipe ogier early (when you have silver heart on) and full otk teams

but maybe they messed up slightky
good otk aims for turn 3-5 oneshots
and actual oneshot not leave one unit at 10 hp
silver heart type generally doesnt win against otk as much
my deck is very aggressive, it's not only this ogier stuff
I'm using critical point and fin of sorrow
can you team snipe someone?
feels like you could with ogier even before daff wheel
taunt and then dump strikes and a bit to snipe
so you could just snipe the otk lynchpin and other snipers
yeah, im not sure if fin of sorrow is good enough to use though
im still thinking what to use there
i like killing my allies faster
i feel like you could mix a snipe setup in here while still keeping the daff wheel
like my older salv + daff wheel comp still uses pandia+lily to cleave if opponents dont defend against it
two in one

wrong clip
without even using charge

i think
removes shield
dispel would remove taunt cause taunt is a buff
if you end up needing ogier taunt
on some key enemy
yeah

oh ogier frontline?
hmm

self draw the arith cap nuke is pretty good

ded

honestly same
otk rn is in a bad spot
gets countered by too many different things
strike based stuff is dead in a ditch cause of paralysis half the time

kinda ok ish
doesnt really have finishing power
I have hopes for poetic bygone days + clementine
there's a lot of potential there, but its easily countered and requires lucky draw
All of Her seems like the best posse by a long shot
like bleed output is good enough to kill 2 on turn 3
which is good but
it gets deleted by any dispel or cleanse or shield
and you cant trigger it like nymph triggers poison
so it ends up being mostly moot cause people love bringing the cleanse staff and other self dispels or shield
I haven't seen cleanse in quite a long time
must be lower ratings
I think it has lost popularity
cleanse a lot
yeah, when I was newer I thought it was a mandatory include for all teams
That was during a time in which every single match of mine went into deathmatch bc of how slow both teams were
cleanse wheel gets used less at higher ratings in my experience
yeah ik ive been there
even still bleed comp has low finishing power
howd you get enhance and barrier while still doing heavy injury?
thought that posse on last unit only does one of the two
it does both
it's super strong
it's specifically when it is the last one alive and the posse gets used. it won't give any buffs if two are alive and you kill one with it.
